description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 3, 2025 at 5:22 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on S. Mansfield Avenue near Westhaven Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound on a narrow portion of S. Mansfield Avenue, made more narrow by the presence of a pickup 
truck on the east side of the roadway parked partially in a driveway and partially with the rear of the pickup truck in the roadway. As the 
Waymo AV maneuvered to pass the parked pickup truck, an SUV traveling northbound approached the pickup truck and Waymo AV. The 
Waymo AV came to a stop to yield to the SUV, which continued forward without stopping. The Waymo AV activated its hazard lights and 
shifted into reverse to attempt to make room for the passing SUV, but as the SUV attempted to pass between the Waymo AV and the rear of 
the pickup truck, the left side of the SUV made contact with the rear left side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the 
Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
